title: Keep current search term when changing views
excerpt:

posts.author: kmfta (Kirsty Albin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to keep the current search term in Monday when changing views. We have different views for certain areas, e.g fees, application status, and need to change views when on a particular client.
When we do this however, it clears the search bar and we have to enter it again. Is there a way to stop this?

posts.author: jennap (Jenna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @kmfta

This is not possible at this time as each view is seen as unique in terms of it’s filtering. This is especially necessary when certain views are created to have very specific filters, which may cause confusion if you are unaware that your search from a previous view now affecting the current view you are in.

However, I do think this is an interesting concept and would encourage you to utilize our Feature Feedback section of the Community to share your thoughts and allow others to “Vote” for that feature as well!: Feature Feedback

In the meantime, you can also check out this article for more details on our filtering abilities: The Board Filters

I hope this helps!

Cheers,
Jenna

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
